focus: code-vs-reference correctness (canonical UniPC bh2 predictor/corrector, arXiv:2302.04867)
findings: one high-severity off-by-one in corrector order (order_c = min(max_order, len(m_list)+1)) that indexed a nonexistent past model value on the second step; fixed to min(max_order, len(m_list)) in methods/unipc and the trajectory scaffold. R/b construction, hh=-h, B_h=expm1(hh) (bh2), base step with h_phi_1, reduced predictor solve, full corrector solve, einsum, and one-predict-per-step NFE=20 all verified consistent with wl-zhao/UniPC and diffusers UniPCMultistepScheduler.
post_fix_smoketest: standalone + scaffold loops run end-to-end, NFE exactly 20, finite output, order ramp 1->2->3 without index errors
